posts.author: tylerb (Tyler - Solisana Apps)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey all,

Docs in Board View is live in the marketplace!

If you’ve wanted to embed a Workdoc in a Board View, this is the app you’ve been looking for.

Install it here
See it in the Marketplace
How to

It’s perfect for keeping your documentation with your boards:

what-it-does1920×960 183 KB

Features:
Keep control of your views: Only board owners can add workdocs to a view
Doc permissions are respected: If they can see the workdoc normally, they can see it in the view.
Clean, read-only view: No editing clutter (each doc view has a link to the doc for quick access)
Show multiple docs per board: Every board can have multiple views each with their own workdoc:

multiple-docs-to-one-board1920×960 94.5 KB

New features are in development, such as:

  • Adding multiple Workdocs to a single view (i.e. Keep all your “Onboarding” docs in one view)
  • Adding all docs from a board column to a single view (this gives you a simpler interface if you already have a documentation board with a Workdoc column)

I hope this helps some of you!
